# terrible_azure_azcollection_azure_rm_eventgrid_topic (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against
- `name` (String) Name of the topic.
- `resource_group` (String) Name of a resource group where the topic exists or will be created.

### Optional

- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of name→value).
- `extended_location_name` (String) The extended location name. Required if *kind=AzureArc*.
- `extended_location_type` (String) The extended location type. Required if *kind=AzureArc*.
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `identity` (String) Identity for the Server.
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `inbound_ip_rules` (String) List of inbound IP rules
- `input_mapping_default_values` (String) When input_schema is specified as CustomEventSchema, this parameter can be used to specify input mappings based on default values. You can use this parameter when your custom schema does not include a field that corresponds to one of the three fields supported by this parameter.
- `input_mapping_fields` (String) When input_schema is specified as CustomEventSchema, this parameter is used to specify input mappings based on field names.
- `input_schema` (String) Schema in which incoming events will be published to this topic/domain. If you specify CustomEventSchema as the value for this parameter, you must also provide values for at least one of input_mapping_default_values / input_mapping_fields.
- `kind` (String) The kind of topic resource.
- `location` (String) Valid azure location. Defaults to location of the resource group.
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `public_network_access` (String) This determines if traffic is allowed over public network.
- `regenerate_keys` (String) if `present` and topic exsists (ie update action) this will force the listed key to be regeneratd. This cannot be idempotent. Everytime this is called it will regenerate the key(s).
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `state` (String) State of the Eventgrid Topic. Use `present` to create or update and `absent` to delete.
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution

### Read-Only

- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `eventgrid_topic` (String) Eventgrid Topic.
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
